Item Name: Green Jay Gourmet Lemon Stuffed Olives – Stuffed Green Olives for Cocktail Garnish & Cheese Board Recipes – Dirty Martini Olives & Cocktail Olives – Gourmet Olives – All Natural – Large – 2 x 16 Oz
Bullet Point 1: BRING YOUR COCKTAILS TO LIFE: Lift your homemade cocktails to a pro level with Green Jay Gourmet Stuffed Olives; Dirty martini olives & cocktail olives that go hand in hand with your favorite drinks
Bullet Point 2: PREMIUM GREEN OLIVES: Our stuffed olive products use premium, juicy, large & carefully selected green olives that pack enough punch to add a whole new dimension to your cocktails; These work well with all cheese board & charcuterie board recipes
Bullet Point 3: LEMON STUFFED OLIVES: Each olive is stuffed with fresh lemon peel & generously bathed in vinegar brine to create a rich & nuanced bitter-tart- salty experience; Premium gourmet olives
Bullet Point 4: HALKIDIKI GREECE: The ancient Greeks ascribed the olives divine origins. Homer attributed olive oil as liquid gold and Sophocles, entitled the olive tree “the tree that feeds children”. All Green Jay Gourmet stuffed olives are sourced from Greece's Halkidiki region and then stuffed and jarred right here in the USA
Bullet Point 5: SMALL BATCH PRODUCTION: Our Stuffed Olives are produced in small batches with great care & attention to ensure the highest quality; Used regularly by leading restaurants & bartenders; Click ‘Add to Cart’ to order two large 16 oz jars right away
Product Description: Green Jay Gourmet Lemon Stuffed Olives pack a whole lot of punch – and then some. Juicy olives are stuffed with lemon peel & bathed in carefully prepared vinegar brine to create a unique blend of bitter-tart-salty-fruity flavors. It sounds great, but tastes much, much greater!

catalog_content:
Item Name: Rawmio Hazelnut Quinoa Crunch Bark - 2.12 oz. - Raw, Organic, Vegan, Kosher - Pack of 1
Bullet Point 1: Ideal for both children and adults! Hazelnut Quinoa Crunch Bark is an excellent choice as a healthy snack, a refreshing breakfast, or a gourmet dessert.
Bullet Point 2: This high-quality artisanal chocolate hazelnut bark is made with minimal processing and uses only plant-based ingredients.
Bullet Point 3: This product is a handcrafted chocolate bark made with ingredients by Rawmio. It's USDA Organic, raw, vegan, soy-free, flour-free, dairy-free and gluten-free.
Bullet Point 4: Contains 70% of raw cacao. Ingredients: Organic Oat Milk Chocolate (Organic Raw Cacao Butter, Organic Coconut Sugar, Organic Raw Cacao Nibs, Organic Oat Milk Powder, Organic Lucuma Powder, Organic Vanilla Bean Powder, Sea Salt), Organic Toasted Hazelnuts, Organic Puffed Quinoa, Celtic Sea Salt.
Bullet Point 5: Fairly Traded Cacao. We are committed to ensuring that our farmers receive a fair price for their products, which allows for sustainable production and improved living conditions. Adhering to the principles of fair trade, our company promotes cooperative growth and community development, and we aim to make a positive impact on the livelihoods of those who contribute to our chocolate-making process.
Product Description: Immerse yourself in the unparalleled fusion of nourishing superfoods and the divine taste of raw chocolate with Rawmio's 70% stone ground raw chocolate, complemented by the delightful crunch of hazelnuts and puffed quinoa. At Rawmio, we take immense pride in crafting the finest organic chocolate. By harmoniously blending the potent nutrition of antioxidant-rich superfoods with the sheer indulgence of raw chocolate, we offer you a treat that's delightful but wholesome. Embracing a simple yet effective approach, we carefully select clean, pure ingredients and employ artisanal methods to create chocolate that goes beyond a mere sweet indulgence. Treat yourself to the exquisite delights of Rawmio's sweet and savory chocolate creations and embark on a journey of sensory bliss and well-being.
Value: 2.12
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium artisanal product positioned in the organic, vegan, and fair-trade niche with a focus on health-conscious consumers. The 70% raw cacao content and inclusion of superfoods like quinoa and hazelnuts justify a higher price point, while the small 2.12 oz pack size limits volume-based value. Packaging design and certification badges (USDA Organic, Kosher, Fair Trade) reinforce the premium, ethical positioning. Targets health-oriented, specialty snack buyers willing to pay for clean-label, minimally processed ingredients.
